pokemon:throh.name: Throh
pokemon:throh.summary: When it encounters a foe bigger than itself, it wants to throw it. It changes belts as it gets stronger.
expansionNotes: Competitive, encounter, and media coverage can be expanded later without changing the page contract.

pokedexEntries.text: When it encounters a foe bigger than itself, it wants to throw it. It changes belts as it gets stronger.
When it tightens its belt, it becomes stronger. Wild Throh use vines to weave their own belts.
When it encounters a foe bigger than itself, it wants to throw it. It changes belts as it gets stronger.
When it tightens its belt, it becomes stronger. Wild Throh use vines to weave their own belts.
They train in groups of five. Any member that can’t keep up will discard its belt and leave the group.
It performs throwing moves with first-rate skill. Over the course of many battles, Throh’s belt grows darker as it absorbs its wearer’s sweat.
When they encounter foes bigger than themselves, they try to throw them. They always travel in packs of five.
When it encounters a foe bigger than itself, it wants to throw it. It changes belts as it gets stronger.
When it tightens its belt, it becomes stronger. Wild Throh use vines to weave their own belts.
When it encounters a foe bigger than itself, it wants to throw it. It changes belts as it gets stronger.

competitiveSummary: Competitive notes are pending a richer source import.
loreSummary: When it encounters a foe bigger than itself, it wants to throw it. It changes belts as it gets stronger.
